channel.title: MYB
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from MYB, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: A Century Before AI, Fake Photos Were Already Fooling Us
item.description: Images that lie are hardly new to the age of artificial intelligence. At the Rijksmuseum in Amsterdam, the exhibit “Fake” tracks the long history of p...

item.title: Evolving U.S. Property Records For The Modern Era
item.description: The U.S. real estate market is worth $50 trillion, but property records are still stuck in the 18th century. AI-powered infrastructure may finally be ...

item.title: AI Offers A Great Productivity Boost. Or Maybe Not
item.description: New study suggests that AI's productivity gains may ultimately be counter-productive,

item.title: Epstein Could Have Made $100 Million On A Secret Police Tech Investment
item.description: Former Israel prime minister Ehud Barak helped the convicted sex trafficker quietly invest $1 million in a police tech startup in 2015. Its founder sa...

item.title: ‘Overwatch’ Adding 5 Heroes At Once Is A Very Smart Move For One Particular Reason
item.description: Overwatch has never added so many heroes at once since the game's launch in 2016. Here's why it's smart of Blizzard to introduce five at the same time...

item.title: A starting point for the blog
item.description: The challenge of the library is the card catalog. If you don’t know what you’re looking for, it’s hard to find much of anything. The challenge of the ...

item.title: Process thinking
item.description: Sure, you made it work this time, but will it work next time? Can you teach the method to someone else? Do you have a protocol for what to do when it ...

item.title: Free agency
item.description: Unrestricted free choice is a myth. There are always boundaries and trade-offs. But being fully stuck is also a myth. We might not like the trade offs...

item.title: Vessel size
item.description: “May your cup runneth over…” This begs the question: how big a cup? The logistics of vessel size determine how much money we need to raise, how big a ...

item.title: Voluntary stories
item.description: The narrative we run in our head is a choice. It might or might not be based on objective reality and verified history. Doesn’t matter, it’s still a c...
